description_long: This cowshed is a rectangular, single-story agricultural building with a prominent hip roof covered in reddish-brown asphalt shingles. The structure features a combination of vertical and horizontal wooden siding, with the front facade displaying a large sliding barn door in a deep red color, accented by black metal hardware. The side and rear walls are clad in natural, light-colored horizontal wooden planks, giving the building a rustic yet functional appearance. The open section on the front right provides access for livestock or equipment, while the overhanging eaves offer some protection from the elements. There are no visible windows, but the exposed rafters and open eaves may aid in passive ventilation. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for housing cattle or storing agricultural supplies.
description: A rectangular cowshed with a reddish-brown hip roof, red sliding barn door, and light wood siding, featuring an open front section and no visible windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red sliding barn door, open entryway on the right, and detailed roof shingles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the light wood horizontal siding and the hip roof's slope, with no doors or windows visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the uninterrupted light wood siding and the full expanse of the hip roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with light wood siding and the hip roof, mirroring the other side and showing no openings.
attribute_door_style: sliding barn door, wood with black metal hardware
